passiveAbilities.name: Feeble
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -2. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

passiveAbilities.name: Spirits of the Fallen
passiveAbilities.description: Once per turn this model may use an Arcane Ability printed on a friendly slain model, ignoring any Once Per Game restrictions, paying its cost as normal.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Faerie Fire Pistol]
activeAbilities.description: The name ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while engaged.

arcaneAbilities.name: Faerie Fire Pistol
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Poor Unfortunate Souls
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target character restores X Wds then loses X Energy.
Target other Pirate gains X Energy then suffers X Wds.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Sink to the Deep
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Reduce Dmg suffered by -1. If there is at least one friendly slain non-Thrall character, instead reduce Dmg suffered to W.
